caption: A man with a beard, wearing a grey long-sleeved shirt under a black vest, speaks into a microphone labeled "ANI" held by an unseen interviewer. The scene is set outdoors in a park or field with trees and a grassy area in the background. The video frames are overlaid with News18 India graphics, including the logo "NEWS 18 इंडिया" and a digital clock showing "10:04 PM." On-screen text banners feature names like "नीतीश कुमार" and phrases such as "नीतीश कुमार: पहले भी NDA में थे,बीच में कहीं गए थे" and "नीतीश कुमार: BJP के साथ पहले भी." Small portrait photos of various political figures appear in sidebars, accompanying names like "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," "विजय चौधरी," and "संतोष सुमन." As the clip progresses, the text on the bottom banner and the profile images in the sidebars shift, while the man continues to speak and gesticulate in the same outdoor location.
